source.notes: Approximated from FY 2025-26 enacted budget summary categories. Department-level dollar amounts vary year over year; proportions are stable. Verify exact dollars against the official Enacted Budget line-item book before any public launch.

categories.label: Human Services
categories.shortDescription: Mostly Medicaid (Medical Assistance), Long-Term Living, child welfare, mental health — fastest-growing spending area

categories.label: Education
categories.shortDescription: Pre-K-12 basic and special education, plus state appropriations to PASSHE / community colleges / state-related universities

categories.label: Corrections
categories.shortDescription: State prisons, probation, parole — incarcerates ~37,000 people

categories.label: Debt Service & Treasury
categories.shortDescription: Interest and principal payments on outstanding state debt

categories.label: All Other Departments
categories.shortDescription: Health, Agriculture, Environmental Protection, Transportation match, State Police, Labor, Aging, Military Affairs, and dozens of smaller agencies
